domains.name: Foundation Model Integration and Solution Design

questions.stem:
A retail assistant must stream partial responses from a Bedrock model while preserving a multi-turn message history and tool-result messages.

Which API should the developer use for the chat turn?

options.text: Create a Knowledge Base ingestion job for each user message
Call the Bedrock ConverseStream operation with the accumulated messages and inference configuration
Invoke an Agent action group directly without model orchestration
Start a batch inference job and poll S3 for partial tokens

questions.explanation:
**A** is incorrect because it changes a requirement in the scenario or applies a related service feature in a way that the documentation does not support for this use case. See [Amazon Bedrock Converse API](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/conversation-inference.html).

**B** is correct because this choice matches the documented behavior for the service in the scenario and satisfies the stated constraint without adding unnecessary components. See [Amazon Bedrock Converse API](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/conversation-inference.html).

**C** is incorrect because it changes a requirement in the scenario or applies a related service feature in a way that the documentation does not support for this use case. See [Amazon Bedrock Converse API](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/conversation-inference.html).

**D** is incorrect because it changes a requirement in the scenario or applies a related service feature in a way that the documentation does not support for this use case. See [Amazon Bedrock Converse API](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/conversation-inference.html).
